name: starknet-rwa-oracle-publisher
description: Off-chain oracle publisher: fetches US BLS CPI and FRED rates, pushes to Starknet InflationOracle

scripts.build:all: npm run build:contracts && npm run extract:abis && npm run build
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:oracle && npm run deploy:factory
scripts.full-deploy: npm run build:all && npm run deploy:all && npm run deploy:real-assets
